description_long: This object is a whimsical, bunny-shaped pancake cookie decorated with colorful icing. The surface is golden-brown and slightly textured, resembling a baked good with a crisp exterior. White, pink, and gray icing is piped along the edges and across the body, forming facial features and decorative lines. The pancake is relatively flat but has a slight thickness, with the icing adding dimension and visual interest. The back side is plain and textured, while the front displays the detailed icing work. The overall appearance is playful and festive, likely intended as a novelty treat.
description: A bunny-shaped pancake cookie with golden-brown texture and colorful icing details, featuring white, pink, and gray decorations.
description_view_0: The back of the bunny pancake shows a plain, golden-brown, textured surface with no visible icing.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thickness of the pancake and the raised icing decorations along the edges.
description_view_2: The front view displays the bunny's face and body, decorated with white, pink, and gray icing details.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the edge icing and the textured back, with some icing visible along the perimeter.
